title: draba korshinskyi
intro: Draba korshinskyi, a perennial plant species within the family Brassicaceae, is also known as Korshinsky's draba or Russian draba. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Draba korshinskyi are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
